ogTitle: Freds Pass vs Galiwinku: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Freds Pass and Galiwinku.
heading: Freds Pass vs Galiwinku — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Freds Pass, Northern Territory and Galiwinku, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Freds Pass has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Galiwinku (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Freds Pass or Galiwinku safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Freds Pass has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Galiwinku scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Freds Pass scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Galiwinku scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Freds Pass or Galiwinku?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Freds Pass has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
